field_values.action_summary: Tars Tarkas and Kantos Kan lead a fleet toward Helium, only to intercept a Zodangan siege force. A massive aerial battle erupts, characterized by Thark marksmanship and the arrival of the Heliumite navy, turning the tide against the Zodangans.
location_requirements: The skies above the approach to Helium
various Thark and Zodangan aerial vessels
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of fleet movements; Medium tracking shots of aerial combat; Close-ups of warriors firing weapons; POV shots from vessels
movement_notes: Precise vessel positions in the sky during dogfights
Tracking the number of ships remaining for each faction
Weaponry and ammunition usage/depletion during combat
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH026_SC001

## Production Intent
The scene must visually communicate the massive scale of the aerial conflict through coordinated fleet movements. It requires high-intensity combat choreography that highlights the specific marksmanship capabilities of the Tharks and the tactical arrival of the Heliumite navy to demonstrate military synergy.

## Required Cast
- tars_tarkas (Green skin, professional demeanor, prominent Thark warrior/leader)
- kantos_kan
- Zodangan Commanders
- Heliumite Navy Officers

## Required Environments
- The skies above the approach to Helium
- various Thark and Zodangan aerial vessels

## Continuity Constraints
- Precise vessel positions in the sky during dogfights
- Tracking the number of ships remaining for each faction
- Weaponry and ammunition usage/depletion during combat

## Beat List
- BT001: Tars Tarkas and Kantos Kan lead a fleet of Thark vessels and prisoners toward Helium.
- BT002: The fleet intercepts a Zodangan siege force attempting to besiege Helium.
- BT003: A massive aerial battle erupts, characterized by intense Thark marksmanship.
- BT004: The Heliumite navy arrives on the scene.
- BT005: The combined forces turn the tide against the Zodangans, resulting in triumph.
